gradients.text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-purple-200 to-purple-400

buttons.primary: bg-[#7B2FF7] hover:bg-[#6020C0] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(123,47,247,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(123,47,247,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-[#7B2FF7] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/5
buttons.glow: relative overflow-hidden group bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7B2FF7] to-[#00C2FF] p-[1px] rounded-full

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-purple-500/30 group
cards.feature: bg-[#0F051D] border border-purple-900/20 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-purple-500/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.glass: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7B2FF7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#7B2FF7] transition-all

badges.neon: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-300 border border-purple-500/20 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(123,47,247,0.2)]

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Import them in index.css or index.html.
Implement a 'Starry Background' or 'Particle Network' effect in the Hero section using canvas or a lightweight library if possible, otherwise use the provided hero_bg image with a dark overlay.
Ensure all cards use the 'glass' style defined in components.cards.
The 'Contact Us' form must be a glassmorphism card floating over a dark, animated background.
Use the 'purple glow' effect on the primary CTA buttons.
The 'Portfolio' section should use a masonry layout or a high-end carousel.
Add a 'Scroll Progress' bar at the top of the page with a neon gradient.
Ensure the 'Countdown Timer' in the announcement bar is functional and sticky.
Use 'framer-motion' for all entrance animations (fade-in-up) and hover effects.
Do not use solid white backgrounds anywhere. Always use dark backgrounds with light text.
For the 'Pricing' toggle, use a custom animated switch with a neon glow.
The 'WhatsApp' button should be fixed at the bottom right with a pulse animation.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
